title: campanula pulla
intro: Campanula pulla, also known as bluebell or small bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Campanula pulla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Campanula pulla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
